title: The Sims™ FreePlay
notes:
Sul Sul! The On The Case story reaches its finale with Heist Stakes.

Here’s what’s unfolding:

- A Matter of Framing: Face off at a museum after hours
- A Toast to Trouble: Influence a high-society gala as tensions rise
- A Spy Who Helped Me: Craft tools and tactics with a new contact
- Bank On It!: Face off in a bank where everything is set
- The Final Rendezvous Look: A sleek undercover style delivered to your inbox

The pieces are in place…it’s time to make your move, Simmers.
